description_for_human: Generate UML and other types of diagrams directly from text descriptions.
description_for_model: This plugin helps you generate various types of diagrams from textual descriptions. It supports UML diagrams (Class, Sequence, Activity, etc.), Mermaid, D2, and more. Use POST /generate_diagram with lang, type, code (required), output_format (default svg), optional theme. Returns url, message, playground, local_path. Use GET /supported_formats for types and formats.
